posts.author: Teresa.DevSamurai (Teresa Tran)
posts.cookedHtml:
TEAMBOARD’S NEW FEATURES! LOG WORK IN ITEM PAGE

I’m excited to announce a new feature in Teamboard! You can now log your work directly on the item page. This makes it easier to keep track of your work without leaving the task.

But that’s not all! This release has many other new features to help you work better.

Click here to see all the new features: Ver 5.3.1 - Release notes

We value your feedback, so let us know what you think about these updates.

Happy planning!

Try TeamBoard for free: TeamBoard - Resource Planning & Time Tracking - monday.com Marketplace
